zh.lifeSummary: Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux於1278年出生在英國英格蘭素斯 越可爾曼諾。她於大約1297年與Thomas II de Featherstone在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德費亞黑斯東結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1360年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux于1278年出生在英国英格兰素斯 越可爾曼諾。她于大约1297年与Thomas II de Featherstone在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德費亞黑斯東结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1360年在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ainsworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place near Manchester named Ainsworth, from the Old English personal name Ægen + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
English (Yorkshire): in Yorkshire the name was a variant of, or confused with   Hainsworth  .

variants.name: Hainsworth
meanings: (Yorkshire): habitational name from Hainworth in Keighley, Yorkshire, named from the Old English personal name Hagena + Old English worth ‘enclosure’. The intrusive -s- was acquired by the late 15th century, probably through false association with the Lancashire surname Ainsworth in 2 below.
variant of Ainsworth in Lancashire. Names such as de Haynesworth and de Heynesworth occur in the surrounding area in the 14th century.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Mariotta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: pet form of Maria , now occasionally used as a given name in the English-speaking world. In Gaelic Scotland Mar(i)etta is sometimes found as an Anglicized form of Mairead, the Gaelic equivalent of Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux was born in 1278, in Manor, South Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Thomas II de Featherstone about 1297, in Featherstone, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1360, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux est née en 1278, à Manor, South Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Thomas II de Featherstone environ 1297, à Featherstone, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1360, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneuxは1278年にイギリスイギリスソウス ヨークシュアイアマノーで生まれた。約1297年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドフエアスエルストーンでThomas II de Featherstoneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1360年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux(은)는 1278년 영국 잉글랜드 소우스 요르크실르 먼어에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1297년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 피더스톤에서 Thomas II de Featherstone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux родилась в 1278 г. в местности манор, соут еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas II de Featherstone около 1297 г. в местности фитирстоун, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1360 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.
